ddls:
CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the in-game item */,
  "level_2_analysis" REAL /* Level 2 analysis value of the item performance */,
  "win_rate" REAL /* Win rate associated with the item */,
  "item_type" TEXT /* Type of the item (e.g., equipment, consumable) */,
  "item_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the item */,
  "rarity" TEXT /* Rarity level of the item (e.g., common, rare, epic) */,
  "price" INTEGER /* Price of the item in the in-game currency */,
  "acquisition_date" TEXT /* Date when the item was added to the game */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL to the item's icon image */,
  "is_purchasable" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the item can be purchased in the game store */,
  "is_tradable" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the item can be traded between players */,
  "item_category" TEXT /* Category of the item (e.g., weapon, armor, potion) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_adjustments" (
  "adjustment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each adjustment */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the item being adjusted */,
  "adjusted_win_rate" REAL /* New win rate after adjustment */,
  "adjusted_level_2_analysis" REAL /* New level 2 analysis value after adjustment */,
  "adjusted_item_type" TEXT /* New item type after adjustment */,
  "adjusted_item_description" TEXT /* New item description after adjustment */,
  "adjusted_rarity" TEXT /* New rarity level after adjustment */,
  "adjusted_price" INTEGER /* New price after adjustment */,
  "adjusted_is_purchasable" INTEGER /* New purchasable status after adjustment */,
  "adjusted_is_tradable" INTEGER /* New tradable status after adjustment */,
  "adjusted_item_category" TEXT /* New item category after adjustment */,
  "adjustment_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the adjustment made */,
  "adjustment_date" TEXT /* Date of the adjustment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adjustment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_adjustments_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_name" TEXT /* Name of the game */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the game */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the game (e.g., MOBA, RPG) */,
  "developer" TEXT /* Developer of the game */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the game */,
  "platforms" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of platforms the game is available on */,
  "average_player_count" INTEGER /* Average number of players in the game */,
  "peak_player_count" INTEGER /* Peak number of players in the game */,
  "game_icon_url" TEXT /* URL to the game's icon image */,
  "game_trailer_url" TEXT /* URL to the game's trailer video */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage event */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item used */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game where the item was used */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player using the item */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match during which the item was used */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Count of how many times the item was used in the match */,
  "usage_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the match in minutes */,
  "is_victory" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the match was won */,
  "player_level" INTEGER /* Level of the player at the time of the match */,
  "team_size" INTEGER /* Number of players in the player's team */,
  "opponent_team_size" INTEGER /* Number of players in the opponent's team */,
  "map_name" TEXT /* Name of the map where the match was played */,
  "game_mode" TEXT /* Mode of the game (e.g., ranked, casual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_usage_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_usage_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the player joined the platform */,
  "player_level" INTEGER /* Current level of the player */,
  "total_matches_played" INTEGER /* Total number of matches played by the player */,
  "total_victories" INTEGER /* Total number of victories by the player */,
  "total_defeats" INTEGER /* Total number of defeats by the player */,
  "preferred_game_mode" TEXT /* Preferred game mode of the player */,
  "preferred_map" TEXT /* Preferred map of the player */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the player's account (e.g., active, banned) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the player's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "win_rates" (
  "win_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the win rate entry */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item associated with the win rate */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match for which the win rate was recorded */,
  "win_rate" REAL /* Win rate of the item in that match */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the win rate was recorded */,
  "usage_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the match in minutes */,
  "is_victory" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the match was won */,
  "player_level" INTEGER /* Level of the player at the time of the match */,
  "team_size" INTEGER /* Number of players in the player's team */,
  "opponent_team_size" INTEGER /* Number of players in the opponent's team */,
  "map_name" TEXT /* Name of the map where the match was played */,
  "game_mode" TEXT /* Mode of the game (e.g., ranked, casual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("win_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_win_rates_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)
